text:
Cheers. That does look interesting, esp. "We just threw in some color, some bold headers and cleaned it up a bit, so they go easy on the eye." 
function gman () {
     man "$1" | col -b > "/tmp/$1"
     open -a "/Applications/Google Chrome.app" "/tmp/$1"
